meaning: next of kin 最近亲者
examples: What was the most successful European company of the 1990s? Easy: Nokia (NOK).
Norwegian Krone (currency code NOK) is the name of the currency used in Norway.
Nokia (NOK) has a vast customer base but lacks a smartphone platform to keep them loyal.
Nokia ( NOK) saw its yield inch toward 8% as revenue growth dropped sharply.
Nokia (NYSE: NOK) is expected to resume development of its unconfirmed Windows RT tablet.
